theme_and_archetype.vibe: Fresh, trustworthy, medical-grade clean, and slightly urgent (for the dangers section).
theme_and_archetype.rationale: As an AC cleaning service dealing with mold and health hazards, the design must inspire trust and cleanliness (light blue/white). The 'scary facts' section requires high contrast (danger/warning cues) to drive action, contrasting beautifully with the pristine 'PureBreeze' sections.

rules.headings: Use 'Outfit' for all headings. Apply tight letter spacing (tracking-tight) for H1-H3. Use font-black for extreme emphasis in the 'Scary Facts' section, and font-light to font-medium for premium brand feel elsewhere.
rules.body: Use 'DM Sans' with leading-relaxed. Never use Inter or Roboto.

colors.rules: Avoid default gray for text; use slate (blue-tinted gray) to harmonize with the light blue brand color. The 'Scary Facts' section should flip to a dark mode layout (Deep Black background) with Warning Red and stark white text for maximum emotional impact.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous padding. p-8 to p-12 for bento cards. py-24 or py-32 for section wrappers.

grid_strategy.features: Bento grid (Tetris style). Mix col-span-12, col-span-8, col-span-4.
grid_strategy.services: Even 3-column or 4-column grid (Control Room style) for equal hierarchy.

buttons.primary: bg-sky-500 hover:bg-sky-600 text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold shadow-lg shadow-sky-500/30 transition-all hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.ai_quote: Relative container, bg-gradient-to-r from-sky-400 to-blue-600 text-white rounded-2xl px-8 py-4 font-bold overflow-hidden group, with an animated shine/tracing beam effect on hover.
buttons.danger_cta: bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700 text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold

cards.standard: bg-white rounded-3xl border border-sky-100 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] p-8
cards.danger: bg-neutral-900 rounded-3xl border border-red-900/50 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(220,38,38,0.1)] p-8 text-white
cards.glass: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/40 shadow-sm rounded-3xl p-8

components.shadcn_overrides: Use Shadcn components for the AI Quote form (Input, Label, Button, Card). Override default border-radius to rounded-2xl to match the modern/organic theme. Ensure inputs have focus:ring-sky-500.

motion_and_interactions.hero_animation: The PureBreeze logo/graphic must have a floating animation (Framer Motion y-axis floating). The 'breeze' vectors should have a slow, pulsing opacity and translation to simulate air flow.
motion_and_interactions.scroll_reveals: Use Framer Motion `whileInView` for sections. The 'Scary Facts' should aggressively snap or fade in with high contrast to shock the user.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and increase shadow depth.

hero_graphic.description: Vector illustration of AC blowing glowing blue breeze. Use as the central hero visual or hero background accent.

clean_benefits.description: Pristine, glowing clean AC unit. Use in the 'Benefits of Clean AC' section to show the desired end state.

scary_facts_macro.description: Terrifying macro shot of dust, black mold, and glowing toxic bacteria inside a dark AC vent. Use as a full-bleed background or massive bento grid image in the 'Scary Facts' section.

ai_quote_scanner.description: AI phone scanner tool analyzing an AC unit. Use next to the Photo Quote form.

technician_trust.description: Professional HVAC technician. Use in the 'Selling Points' / 'Why Choose Us' section.

lifestyle_clean_air.description: Clean modern living room representing healthy fresh air. Use as a background or context image in benefits.

sections_blueprint.name: Header & Nav
sections_blueprint.details: Sticky crystal glassmorphism header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80). Logo: 'PureBreeze' with a small CSS-animated breeze SVG. Nav links: Services, Danger Facts, AI Quote, Contact. CTA: 'Get AI Quote'.

sections_blueprint.name: Hero Section
sections_blueprint.details: Light blue gradient background (bg-sky-50 to white). Bold H1: 'Breathe Pure. Live Better in Queensland.' Subtext about removing mold and restoring airflow. Primary CTA: 'Scan Your AC for an Instant Quote'. Visual: The ac_breeze_logo floating image.

sections_blueprint.name: The 'Scary Facts' (Dangers)
sections_blueprint.details: CRITICAL CONTRAST SHIFT. Background turns pitch black (bg-neutral-950). Red accents. H2: 'What’s Hiding in Your Air?' List facts: Black mold spores, fire risks, skyrocketing energy bills, asthma triggers. Use scary_facts_macro image. Layout: Asymmetric Bento Grid.

sections_blueprint.name: Benefits of Clean AC
sections_blueprint.details: Return to light, fresh theme (bg-white). H2: 'Experience the PureBreeze Difference'. Use pristine_clean_ac image. Points: 30% lower power bills, zero mold, whisper-quiet operation, healthy family.

sections_blueprint.name: AI Photo Quote (Interactive Tool)
sections_blueprint.details: Split layout. Left: ai_quote_scanner image with selling points ('Snap a pic, get a quote in seconds'). Right: Shadcn Form with a Drag & Drop file upload zone (styled with dashed sky-blue borders), inputs for Name, Phone, Email, and Address. Submit button with scanning animation.

sections_blueprint.name: Selling Points & Trust
sections_blueprint.details: Use technician_trust image. Grid of trust badges (Lucide icons): 100% Queensland Owned, Fully Qualified Technicians, Same-Day Service, Eco-Friendly Sanitisation.

sections_blueprint.name: Footer
sections_blueprint.details: Deep Navy background (bg-slate-900). White text. Huge contact display: Phone: 0490 507 878, Email: PureBreeze@gmail.com. List of Queensland service areas (Brisbane, Gold Coast, Sunshine Coast, etc.).

testing_attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, form inputs, file uploaders) MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='ai-quote-upload', data-testid='contact-phone').
